memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description: Hamon Pecche was a minor at his father's death and his custody and marriage were granted to Hugh de Boues. He reached his majority in time to take part with his family (the de Clares) in the baronial …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eve de Peverell於大約1195年出生在英國坎布利其爾埃利時，她的父親Richard Peverel37歲，母親Adelocia Towmay33歲。她於1212年與Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne在英國林可爾史爾可比結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年1月8日在英國英格蘭享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾聖 安德魯 馮 雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eve de Peverell于大约1195年出生在英国坎布利其爾埃利时，她的父亲Richard Peverel37岁，母亲Adelocia Towmay33岁。她于1212年与Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne在英国林可爾史爾可比结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年1月8日在英国英格兰享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾聖 安德魯 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Eve de Peverell was born about 1195, in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Richard Peverel, was 37 and her mother, Adelocia Towmay, was 33. She married Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne in 1212, in Corby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 January 1267, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eve de Peverell est née environ 1195, à Ely, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Peverel, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Adelocia Towmay, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne en 1212, à Corby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1267, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eve de Peverell um 1195 in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Peverel 37 und ihre Mutter Adelocia Towmay 33. Sie hat 1212 in Corby, Lincolnshire, England Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1267 im Alter von 73 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eve de Peverell è nata il circa 1195 nel Ely, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Richard Peverel, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Adelocia Towmay, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne nel 1212, nel Corby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1267, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve de Peverellが約1195年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエリーで生まれた時，父Richard Peverelは37歳，母Adelocia Towmayは33歳であった。1212年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコルビーでHamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年1月8日にイギリスイギリスで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスト アンドリュー ス レスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eve de Peverell(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 캄브리지실르 엘리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Peverel(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelocia Towmay(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1212년 영국 링코실르 코르비에서 Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스트 앤드루 테 레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eve de Peverell nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Peverel, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Adelocia Towmay, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne em 1212, em Corby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1267, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Barnwell, Cambridgeshire, England, Unite: ст андрю т лесс, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Engl: ст андрю т лесс, камбриджешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eve de Peverell родилась около 1195 г. в местности эли, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Peverel было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelocia Towmay, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne в 1212 г. в местности корби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 января 1267 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности ст андрю т лесс, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Great Bealings, Woodbridge, Suffolk, Eng: Great Bealings, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eve de Peverell nació aproximadamente 1195, en Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Peverel, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Adelocia Towmay, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne en 1212, en Corby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de enero de 1267, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en St Andrew the Less, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
